honesty_contract.agreement_rule: mark verified or verified_with_tolerance only when the compared outputs align within stated tolerance
honesty_contract.deviation_rule: mark plot_only, artifact_only, seeded_input_only, or workflow_only when the block is tracked but not claimed as analytical equivalence
honesty_contract.disclosure_rule: report discrepancies directly rather than smoothing them away

limitations: Rendered figure equivalence remains out of scope for plot-only blocks.
The checked-in bundle captures one governed PCM1 evidence family rather than the full lecture decomposition.
summary: Checked-in parity evidence for the Lund primate longevity signal workflow and the bijux-phylogenetics reproductions.

verdict.summary: Analytical and structural comparisons are tracked honestly, with numerical parity claims separated from plot-only surfaces.
